description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Release that triggers on workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on push to release branches with specific paths and tags. In a single docker job with write permissions to ID token and repository contents, check out the code with the given commit or tag, configure GCP credentials, set up QEMU and Docker Buildx, login to GCP registry and DockerHub, build Docker images with a version tag derived from the VERSION file, and push the images to both DockerHub and GCP registry.
